content.en:
"Ancestor Jiangjun, I am willing to trade your Misty Water Stone with the Shadowless Crystal, one for another, how about it?"

Ye Tian put forward his opinion.

"Xuanming Great Ancestor, do you have a Shadowless Crystal?" Jiang Jun Great Ancestor was slightly surprised, he didn't expect that Ye Tian, the Great Ancestor who had just broken through, didn't seem to have been to other territories, his life trajectory was in the True Mountain Territory, and he was even able to obtain the Shadowless Crystal, and he was even willing to trade it.

Then, this shows that there is more than one Shadowless Crystal on Ye Tian's body, if there is only one piece, Ye Tian will definitely not be able to trade.

"Good!"

Jiang Jun Dazu agreed.

Immediately, Ye Tian made a deal with Jiang Jun Great Ancestor.

Ye Tian obtained a misty water stone, while Jiang Jun Great Ancestor obtained a shadowless crystal, and both parties were very satisfied.

......

"It's considered that I have gathered four resources, although there is only one misty water stone, but in case I only use one piece to refine the shadowless crystal, then there is no need to trade the misty water stone again!"

Ye Tian did not immediately practice the Infinite Body, but slowly comprehended this Infinite Body Secret Technique.

After all, the Infinite Body Secret Technique itself is very mysterious, and if you don't understand it thoroughly, you can't practice it at all, and no matter how many resources you collect, it's a waste of resources.

Moreover, once the cultivation fails, it will even cause damage to the body, and it will take a long time to recover.

In the blink of an eye, a long time has passed.

"The secret technique of the Infinite Body can be regarded as a thorough understanding, and the next step is to cultivate!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Any kind of immeasurable body secret technique, if he fails to cultivate, there will be a certain amount of damage, but after he comprehended the infinite body, he found that once this immeasurable body secret technique failed to cultivate, the damage would be very large, and it would directly cause the life level to decrease.

Only one or two cultivation failures will not count the impact, but once the number of failures is too much, it will even cause defects in the life level, making it difficult to break through to the mid-level immeasurable life form level.

"That Jiang Jun Great Ancestor has failed so many times, his hopes of becoming a mid-level immeasurable lifeform should be very low. However, he did not remind me of this. No, it's that many Great Ancestors haven't mentioned this, and I guess they also hope that other Great Ancestors fail to cultivate, and then they won't be able to break through!"

Ye Tian muttered.

After all, this is also normal, if you can't break through yourself, you naturally hope that other Great Ancestors can't break through, so that you will be in a better mood.

Of course, once you have practiced such a superior immeasurable body secret technique as the Infinite Body, the increase in strength will be too great!

Therefore, there are still many primary-level immeasurable lifeforms who are willing to try to cultivate the Infinite Body, or some Primary-Order Immeasurable Lifeforms who have no hope of breaking through will also try to practice such immeasurable body secret techniques.

However, Ye Tian was not worried about the physical damage caused by the failure of the breakthrough, after all, he could copy his body at any time!

......

Truncate Montenegro.

"It's back!"

Ye Tian was at the entrance of the crack, received his copy body, accepted the misty water stone from the True Mountain Collar and several other resources, and then returned to the Truncated Xuanlou and began to try to cultivate the Infinite Body.

I saw Ye Tian put the four materials around, and then began to absorb the power of the four materials to cooperate with the Infinite Body Secret Technique to practice.

Time passed slowly, and Ye Tian's immeasurable life body began to change.

The aura on his body continued to improve, and it seemed that his strength was increasing rapidly.

However, at a certain moment, Ye Tian's body was directly shattered, but it quickly healed again.

"Failed!"

Ye Tian frowned.

He knew that he had maintained absolute control, but there were so many changes in the process of his practice that a momentary negligence led to the failure of his practice.

And he could still sense that there was a slight crack inside the body, and this crack seemed to exist in the immeasurable life form, as if it was a part of the inside of the immeasurable life form.

"No recovery for the time being!"

Ye Tian simply annihilated this replica body, and then re-copied a new replica body, so that the body damage did not exist.

"I still have to collect the misty water stones!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

So, he asked Jiang Jun Dazu to trade again, and the other party directly agreed, and traded again to give Ye Tian a misty water stone.

After Ye Tian left, Jiang Jun Great Ancestor muttered: "It seems that this Xuanming Great Ancestor has failed to cultivate the Infinite Body, the other party has not given up yet, and still wants to continue to cultivate the Infinite Body, this is not a good thing!

It's a pity that he still lacks the Water of Empty Shadow, and only by gathering a Water of Empty Shadow can he continue to cultivate the Infinite Body.

Another time passed.

This time, Ye Tian failed to cultivate the Infinite Body again.

However, instead of continuing to trade the Misty Water Stone with Jiang Jun Great Ancestor, he found another primary-level immeasurable lifeform to trade the Misty Water Stone.

This primary-level immeasurable lifeform was not the Great Ancestor of the True Mountain Domain, but a Great Ancestor of the Blood Domain Domain in the territory next door.

The reason why Ye Tian wanted to trade with the Great Ancestor of the Blood Domain Domain was because he didn't want to expose too many things.

If he traded with Jiang Jun Great Ancestor again and again, it would be very strange why he suddenly had so many shadowless crystals on his body.

Therefore, he didn't want to trade with the same Great Ancestor.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to see the Great Ancestor of the Blood Domain Domain, the Black Eagle Great Ancestor.

However, what this Black Eagle Great Ancestor needed was not the Shadowless Crystal, but the Empty Shadow Water, and Ye Tian also took out a copy of the Empty Shadow Water and successfully traded it to the Misty Water Stone.

In the following days, Ye Tian used the Fire Spirit Divine Gold, Empty Shadow Water, and Shadowless Crystal in his hand to constantly trade with a great ancestor who had the Misty Water Stone in his hand, so he had no shortage of Misty Water Stones at all.

Ye Tian knew that so many Great Ancestors had Misty Water Stones in their hands, it should be that somewhere in the Xuanqi Territory was rich in Misty Water Stones, so many Great Ancestors snatched the Misty Water Stones.

However, he is too lazy to investigate, he only needs to trade, which is more convenient, and the cost is not high anyway.

Finally, when he practiced the Infinite Body for the eighth time, Ye Tian finally succeeded in cultivating.

......

Truncate the Xuanlou.

Ye Tian's body continued to transform, the immeasurable life form continued to become stronger, and the physical body formed a special state, which was called the infinite body state.

At this moment, his immeasurable body is the infinite body, the superior immeasurable body.

And his strength has directly skyrocketed dozens of times!

At this moment, his strength had completely crushed those primary-level immeasurable lifeforms!
